games.name: Deer Hunter 3D
games.description:
Deer Hunter 3D immerses players in a stunning 3D hunting simulator that combines realism with engaging gameplay. Get ready to enhance your shooting skills in a captivating environment where the thrill of the hunt comes alive. With an extensive array of rifles at your disposal, players can practice their aim on moving mechanical targets, allowing them to refine their sniping abilities. Whether you re a seasoned hunter or a beginner, Deer Hunter 3D provides a platform for you to progressively improve your precision and focus as you prepare for the excitement of real wildlife hunting.

As you delve into the game, the richly detailed graphics offer an immersive experience that adds to the intensity of each hunt. Players will find themselves strategizing their shooting techniques while enjoying various challenges that test their accuracy and speed. The multitude of levels in the game ensures that you will constantly have new targets to conquer, keeping the experience fresh and thrilling. A competitive scoring system motivates players to keep improving, providing an added incentive to reach the highest levels of mastery.

Deer Hunter 3D is not only an entertaining simulation but also a fantastic way to learn responsible hunting practices. Players are encouraged to focus on their marksmanship skills while abiding by ethical hunting standards. With the combination of education, excitement, and skill-building, this 3D hunting simulator is perfect for those looking to ignite their passion for hunting.

How to play free Deer Hunter 3D game online

To play Deer Hunter 3D, simply enter the game and select your weapon. Once ready, aim at the moving mechanical targets and shoot them to score points. Practice regularly to enhance your accuracy, and compete against friends to see who can achieve the highest score!
games.instructions: Hold left mouse button or right mouse button to aim release to shoot

games.name: Punkte Verbinden
games.description:
Willkommen zu Punkt Verbinden, dem aufregenden Spiel, das deine Problemlosungsfahigkeiten auf die Probe stellt! In diesem herausfordernden Puzzle-Spiel musst du die Punkte sorgfaltig erfassen und mit geschickten Ziehbewegungen verbinden, um einen klaren und sequentiellen Pfad fur jede Form zu schaffen. Wage dich durch abwechslungsreiche Herausforderungen und entdecke die Faszination der Logik, wahrend du die verschiedenen Muster vervollstandigst.

Punkte Verbinden bietet eine fesselnde Spielerfahrung, die sowohl entspannend als auch anregend ist. Mit mehreren Ebenen, die sich uber drei einzigartige Welten erstrecken, bietet das Spiel unzahlige Stunden voller Denksport. Jede Ebene bringt neue Herausforderungen mit sich, wahrend du versuchst, die Punkte strategisch zu verbinden, um das nachste Level zu erreichen. Es ist ein ideales Spiel, um die Konzentration und kognitive Fahigkeiten zu schulen und gleichzeitig Spa zu haben.

Um Punkte Verbinden zu einem Lieblingsspiel fur Puzzle-Fans zu machen, kombiniert es minimalistische Grafiken mit durchdachtem Gameplay. Jedes Level fordert dich heraus, deine Logik und dein raumliches Vorstellungsvermogen unter Beweis zu stellen. Wenn du die Schonheit der Formen entdecken und gleichzeitig Knochenarbeit fur dein Gehirn leisten mochtest, ist dieses Spiel genau das Richtige fur dich!

How to play free Punkte Verbinden game online

Um Punkte Verbinden zu spielen, beginne, indem du einen Punkt auswahlst. Ziehe dann deine Linie zu einem anderen Punkt, um eine Verbindung zu erstellen. Achte darauf, dass jede verbindet ist, um die gesamte Form zu vervollstandigen! Schaffe strategische Pfade, um die Herausforderung zu meistern und neue Levels freizuschalten.
games.instructions: Verwend zum Spielen die Maus

games.name: Neon Race Retro Drift
games.description:
Get ready to rev up your engines in Neon Race Retro Drift, a thrilling top-down racing game that will take you on a wild ride through neon-lit tracks filled with vibrant colors and high-speed action. Choose from a selection of eye-catching neon cars and prepare for a journey where skidding, sliding, and drifting at breakneck speeds is the name of the game. As you navigate the endless track, you'll encounter power-ups that will enhance your performance and give you the edge over your opponents.

Perfecting your racing line is crucial as you aim to outmaneuver other cars and dodge various obstacles like cones. Each turn and drift will require skill and precision, as mastering the controls is essential to achieve victory. Developed by the creative minds behind classic Amiga racers such as Nitrous (Psygnosis) and ATR (Team17), Neon Race Retro Drift combines nostalgic gameplay with modern thrills for an exhilarating experience. Will you be able to handle the speed and prove your racing prowess?

Rev up your engines and get ready to drift in retro drift! This exciting racing game combines nostalgic graphics with thrilling gameplay, allowing you to experience the art of drifting in a variety of classic cars. Navigate through challenging tracks filled with sharp turns and obstacles, perfecting your drift technique to earn points and unlock new vehicles. The intuitive controls and smooth physics make it easy to jump in and start racing. Ideal for fans of retro games and racing enthusiasts alike, Retro Drift offers endless hours of fun. Can you master the tracks and become the ultimate drift champion? Get ready to hit the road!

With its fast-paced action and retro aesthetics, Neon Race Retro Drift offers an adrenaline-pumping challenge that will keep you on the edge of your seat. Compete against time, beat records, and show off your drifting skills as you immerse yourself in this vibrant world of racing. Just how fast can you go? The finish line awaits!

How to play free Neon Race Retro Drift game online

To play Neon Race Retro Drift, use the arrow keys or on-screen controls to steer your neon car. Accelerate to gain speed and hit power-ups to enhance your performance. Avoid collisions with other cars and obstacles to maintain your momentum and aim for the best racing line to conquer the track. Enjoy the ride!
games.instructions: Arrow keys to control your Neon Racing Car

games.name: Bubble Shooter Love
games.description:
Get ready to experience the delightful world of Bubble Shooter Love, where excitement meets strategy in a colorful bubble-popping adventure! In this engaging game, your objective is to shoot and match three or more bubbles of the same color to clear them from the board and liberate the trapped birds. As you navigate through various levels, you'll encounter different challenges that will test your skills and precision.

One of the standout features of Bubble Shooter Love is its realistic game physics that add a layer of immersion to your gameplay. Each bubble has its own behavior, meaning your shots need to be well-aimed and cleverly planned to create the most effective combos. To enhance your experience, the game includes a three-star ranking system in level mode, allowing you to strive for perfection while clearing each stage. Compete for the highest scores while enjoying countless levels filled with vibrant graphics and engaging puzzles.

In addition to the level mode, Bubble Shooter Love also offers an endless mode for those who want to keep popping bubbles without limits. As you progress, you will encounter a variety of awesome new bubbles and power-ups that will help you tackle difficult challenges and make your gaming experience even more exhilarating.

How to play free Bubble Shooter Love game online

To play Bubble Shooter Love, simply aim your bubble shooter at clusters of similar-colored bubbles. Release to shoot and connect three or more to pop them. Use power-ups wisely and plan your moves strategically to maximize your score as you clear the playing area and free the cute trapped birds!
games.instructions: Press left mouse click to aim Release left mouse click to shoot Esc to toggle pause

games.name: Dinosaurs Survival Active Vulcan Multiplayer
games.description:
Are you prepared for the apocalypse? In Dinosaurs Survival Active Vulcan Multiplayer, you are transported back to a time when dinosaurs roamed the Earth, now facing the catastrophic threat of an erupting volcano. The challenge is immense, as the stakes have never been higher. It s not just about survival; it's about outsmarting the impending doom while navigating a world filled with prehistoric creatures.

Join forces with friends in the survival wave mode, or dive into an exhilarating campaign that offers various gameplay styles with a rich selection of dinosaurs to encounter. Whether you choose to fight alongside your companions or tackle challenges solo, each match emphasizes collaboration and strategy. Customize your arsenal with numerous weapon camos available for free, allowing you to equip your firearms with unique looks, while also enhancing your gear with newly added attachments. Every moment in the game is action-packed, and every decision can mean the difference between life and death.

Explore diverse landscapes and face fierce dinosaurs as you try to escape the devastating eruption. With multiple modes and a growing list of features, Dinosaurs Survival Active Vulcan Multiplayer promises an immersive experience for players of all types.

How to play free Dinosaurs Survival Active Vulcan Multiplayer game online

To start playing Dinosaurs Survival Active Vulcan Multiplayer, simply join a game lobby with friends or other players online. Once the match begins, utilize your weapons to fend off dinosaurs and navigate the volcanic terrain effectively. Work together to complete objectives and ensure your survival against the volcanic threat.
games.instructions: WASD- MOVE CHARACTER MOUSE - SHOOT AIM CHANGE GUN TAB - MENU SPACE - JUMP Q - CAMOS E - ATTACHAMENTS

games.name: Coronavirus Shooter
games.description:
Coronavirus Shooter is an engaging and entertaining game that immerses players in a battle against various virus mutations. Set in a vibrant environment, the game requires players to take on the role of a skilled shooter tasked with eliminating these contagious adversaries. You ll find yourself armed with an array of weapons, each designed to help you eradicate the unwanted virus strains threatening humanity. The distinct gameplay mechanics keep players on their toes, encouraging swift reflexes and strategic thinking.

In Coronavirus Shooter, there are four exhilarating game modes to explore, each offering a unique challenge. The 'Kill' mode focuses on pure action, where players must shoot down as many virus mutations as possible within a set time limit. 'Night Kill' immerses you in a darker atmosphere, adding an extra layer of difficulty as the visibility diminishes. For those who enjoy exploration, the 'Find Artifacts' mode invites players to seek hidden items while navigating through various terrains. Finally, the 'Survival' mode tests your endurance, pushing you to remain in action as long as possible against relentless waves of viral adversaries.

This diverse range of modes ensures that players of all skill levels can enjoy the game, whether they prefer competitive shooting or a more relaxed experience. The vibrant graphics and captivating sound effects enhance the overall gameplay, making Coronavirus Shooter an entertaining way to spend your free time while raising awareness about virus prevention.

How to play free Coronavirus Shooter game online

To play the Coronavirus Shooter game, simply choose your preferred game mode from the main menu. Use your mouse or keyboard controls to aim and shoot at the virus mutations. Keep an eye on your ammunition and dodge incoming attacks to survive longer in each round. Good luck!
games.instructions: WASD or arrow keys to move Left mouse click to shoot Number keys to switch weapon Left Shift to slide Space bar to jump Escape to pause

games.name: SnakeZ io
games.description:
Welcome to the vibrant and thrilling realm of SnakeZ io! Immerse yourself in a captivating snake world where your primary objective is to survive and conquer. As you navigate through the lush landscapes, you must consume everything in your path. From shimmering power-ups to delectable orbs, every bite counts in your quest for growth and dominance.

But beware! This arena is filled with other cunning snakes, each looking to outsmart you. Use your skills strategically to block their movement and force them into a collision with your snake's head. When you succeed, you will reap the rewards from the remnants of your fallen foes, devouring everything they left behind. Every encounter can propel you further, making you larger and more formidable than before. Remember, in this fast-paced world, being the biggest snake not only boosts your confidence but also strengthens your chances of survival!

Engage in exhilarating gameplay that combines quick reflexes, strategy, and a dash of cunning. Whether you're a seasoned player or new to the adventure, SnakeZ io offers endless fun and competitive excitement. Join players from around the world as you explore, eat, and outwit your opponents in a bid to become the ultimate snake lord!

How to play free SnakeZ io game online

To play SnakeZ io, guide your snake using your mouse or keyboard to move around the map. Collect orbs to grow and avoid crashing into other snakes. Use your body strategically to block enemies, forcing them to collide with you for bonus points. Keep an eye out for power-ups that will aid your journey!
games.instructions: Use mouse to play Space to boost

games.name: Endless Crazy Chase
games.description:
Welcome to Endless Crazy Chase, a hilarious and action-packed driving game that will test your reflexes and your ability to evade the relentless pursuit of law enforcement! In this fast-paced game, you find yourself behind the wheel of a mini super speedy car, with nothing but the open road and a desperate need for speed standing between you and capture. You re not just driving for your life; you re also on a quest to collect as many coins as possible while navigating treacherous roads filled with obstacles and obstacles.

Your mission is simple: keep your miniature vehicle moving at breakneck speeds, outsmart the police cars on your tail, and grab every coin you see! As you race through the vibrant landscapes, make sure to stay alert the police cars are aggressive and won't hesitate to crash into you. Each collision can deal damage to your health, so strategic maneuvers and sharp turns are your best defense!

The longer you manage to stay on the run, the higher your score will climb, challenging you to improve with each thrilling session. With bright graphics and engaging gameplay, Endless Crazy Chase provides endless fun and excitement that will keep you coming back for more. Get ready to experience the ultimate chase that combines skill, speed, and strategic thinking!

How to play free Endless Crazy Chase game online

To play Endless Crazy Chase, use the arrow keys or on-screen controls to steer your mini car. Accelerate, navigate the roads, and dodge oncoming police vehicles while collecting coins to boost your score. Be vigilant to avoid crashes that will slow you down and reduce your health!
games.instructions: AD or left right arrow to steer Esc to pause

games.name: Rickshaw Driver
games.description:
Step into the shoes of a humorous rickshaw driver in the engaging game, Rickshaw Driver. In this fast-paced urban adventure, you ll navigate the bustling city streets in your tricycle while picking up clients who are eagerly awaiting their rides. With bright city graphics and engaging gameplay, your mission is to follow the directional arrows that guide you to the correct pickup points, ensuring that your passengers hop in safely.

Once you've successfully picked up your passengers, the real fun begins! You'll need to maneuver through busy streets, dodge obstacles, and avoid traffic as you head to their desired destination. The city offers an array of vibrant locations to explore, and each ride presents new challenges that will test your driving skills and sense of humor. Will you make your clients giggle, or will they get frustrated with your driving skills? The more rides you complete, the more entertaining experiences you ll uncover, making Rickshaw Driver a delightful ride for players of all ages.

The game brings a mix of fun and strategy, as you balance speed with safety while ensuring your passengers arrive on time. With each successful drop-off, you ll earn rewards that can unlock upgrades for your rickshaw, making your driving experience even more exciting. Get ready to hit the busy streets and embark on a laughter-filled journey as the city awaits your quirky style of transportation!

How to play free Rickshaw Driver game online

To play the Rickshaw Driver game, simply use the arrow keys to navigate your tricycle and follow the on-screen arrows to reach your passengers. Once they are safely onboard, set your sights on their destination! Maneuvering through the city requires good timing and agility, so make sure to dodge any obstacles along the way to deliver the perfect ride!
games.instructions: WASD to move C to change camera Escape to pause

games.name: Frogger
games.description:
Step into the exhilarating world of Frogger, where quick thinking and fast reflexes are the keys to success! In this nostalgic game, you'll join various creatures on their perilous quest to traverse bustling roads and treacherous rivers. The age-old question of "Why did the chicken cross the road?" takes on a whole new meaning as you guide your favorite animals across obstacles while avoiding imminent danger. With simple controls and increasingly challenging levels, Frogger offers endless fun for players of all ages.

Your primary objective is to safely maneuver your animals from one side of the road to the other, expertly dodging cars, trucks, and other hazards that threaten their journey. Timing is crucial; you must assess the traffic flow and take calculated risks to ensure that every character makes it across unharmed. As you advance through the levels, you'll encounter more complex routes and difficult obstacles, pushing your skills to the limit in the quest for the highest score possible. Will you be able to conquer the busy streets and lead your animals to safety?

Frogger is not only a test of skill and concentration but also a delightful experience filled with colorful graphics and engaging gameplay. With every successful crossing, you ll feel a rush of accomplishment and the thrill of impending challenges ahead. So jump in, stay sharp, and enjoy the thrill of helping these lovable creatures navigate their way through a world filled with peril and excitement!

How to play free Frogger game online

To start playing the free Frogger game online, use the arrow keys on your keyboard to guide your character. Move up, down, left, or right to dodge obstacles and reach the finish line safely. Keep an eye on approaching traffic and timing your moves wisely to ensure a successful crossing!
games.instructions: WASD or arrow keys to move Tab or Esc to toggle pause

games.name: Sea Animal Transport

Sea Animal Transport is an exciting truck simulation game that immerses players in the thrilling journey of transporting various sea creatures. Set against a vibrant backdrop, the game challenges you to navigate through intricate landscapes while ensuring the safe delivery of marine animals to their designated locations. As you progress, you must master the art of maneuvering your transport truck, balancing speed with caution to avoid mishaps that could harm the precious cargo. Each animal requires special care, and players must also pay attention to fuel limits and time constraints for a successful mission. Transport dolphins, sea turtles, and various other fascinating sea animals while enjoying the realistic graphics and engaging gameplay mechanics.

With its user-friendly controls and captivating challenges, Sea Animal Transport appeals to players of all ages. Test your driving skills and prove that you can keep these enchanting creatures safe during their journey to a new home. It's not just about driving; it's about becoming the best sea animal transporter out there!

How to play free Sea Animal Transport game online

To play Sea Animal Transport online, navigate through the game interface using standard controls for steering and acceleration. Follow the on-screen instructions to pick up animals and drive them to their destination while avoiding obstacles. Watch out for the time limit and manage your fuel wisely to complete each level successfully.

games.name: Corona Virus.io
games.description:
In the thrilling game of Corona Virus.io, players step into the shoes of a heroic Saviour Virus, purposefully injected into a Covid-19 patient. Your mission is to combat the relentless Corona Viruses that threaten your host s health. As you navigate through a vibrant and dynamic environment, your main objective is to grow your virus by becoming the one with the largest nose. Every time your nose touches and eliminates a pesky Corona Virus, it will burst, granting you additional points!

The game offers an exhilarating twist where you must also remain vigilant. If you accidentally collide with other competing viruses, it results in your defeat, and the game ends abruptly. This intricate balance between aggression and evasion creates a challenging and compelling gameplay experience, pushing you to strategize your every move. With each virus you defeat, watch as your nose grows longer and more formidable, but be cautious other players have the same goal and will be vying for the top position!

Players will enjoy an exciting blend of action and strategic planning as they aim to dominate the leaderboard and establish themselves as the ultimate Saviour Virus. Are you ready to take on the challenge and prove your worth in the war against the Corona Virus?

How to play free Corona Virus.io game online

To play the game, simply use your mouse or arrow keys to navigate your Saviour Virus through the game area. Aim to touch the Corona Viruses to eliminate them and gain points, while avoiding contact with other viruses. Keep growing your nose longer as you progress to dominate the game!
games.instructions: Hover mouse to move left right up down Space to Dash Accelerate

games.name: Sweet Crush Match 3

Welcome to the delightful world of Sweet Crush Match 3, where your goal is simple yet addictive: match three or more jellies of the same color to clear them from the board and progress through the levels. These handy power-ups can assist you in overcoming tricky puzzles, giving you the ability to create explosive combinations. The game boasts a myriad of levels that challenge your matching skills, and with each new stage, the anticipation and excitement build. The charming graphics of the sweet jellies contribute to the fun atmosphere, making every match a visually joyous experience.

Whether you're a casual gamer or a match-three master, Sweet Crush Match 3 promises hours of entertainment and fun-filled challenges. Dive into this enchanting world of colors, shapes, and creative gameplay, and discover just how addictive matching jellies can be!

How to play free Sweet Crush Match 3 game online

games.name: Join The Dots
games.description:
Experience the captivating challenge of Join The Dots! This engaging game invites players to tap into their cognitive skills as they strive to connect a series of dots in an orderly fashion. Each level offers a new set of shapes, requiring strategic thinking and precision to trap the dots and create a seamless path.

The mechanics are simple yet addictive: drag to connect the dots in a sequential order. As you advance through the varying difficulty levels, you'll encounter increasingly complex shapes and patterns, stimulating your mind and enhancing your problem-solving abilities. Whether you're taking a break or wanting to immerse yourself in a brainteasing activity, this game is perfect for players of all ages.

Join The Dots not only challenges your intellect but also provides a satisfying sense of achievement as you complete each level. The colorful visuals and smooth gameplay ensure an enjoyable experience, making you want to come back for more. It s an ideal way to unwind while sharpening your cognitive skills. Are you ready to put your brain to the test and see if you can conquer every shape?

How to play free Join The Dots game online

To play Join The Dots, simply select the starting dot and drag your finger or mouse to connect the dots in the correct sequence. Ensure that the connections are made without lifting your finger or mouse. Complete the shape by connecting all dots to advance to the next level. Enjoy the fun!
games.instructions: Use mouse to play

games.name: Fab Tattoo Design Studio
games.description:
Welcome to Fab Tattoo Design Studio, the ultimate game for art enthusiasts and aspiring tattoo artists! Immerse yourself in a vibrant world where creativity knows no bounds. Here, you have the unique opportunity to turn your artistic visions into stunning body art. Feel the thrill as you carefully transform your designs into real tattoos, blending precision and creativity like never before.

The game allows you to experiment with different styles, colors, and techniques, helping you refine your skills as you grow from a novice into a master tattoo artist. Whether you're designing for clients who desire bold pieces or those who prefer delicate designs, you ll have the chance to cater to various tastes, challenging your artistic capabilities while maintaining a focus on accuracy.

games.name: Train Snake Taxi
games.description:
Get ready to embark on a wild ride with Train Snake Taxi, the exhilarating game where strategy meets fun! In this exciting adventure, your main objective is to gather as many passengers as possible as you navigate through vibrant city streets. Each person you collect adds to your growing train, extending its length and creating a delightful spectacle as you snake your way around the level.

Managing your tail becomes crucial because collisions can occur if you're not careful. Avoid running into obstacles and ensure that your snake-like train moves smoothly through the environment. The thrill of successfully gathering every last passenger without crashing will keep you on your toes and wanting to improve your score.

With simple yet captivating gameplay, Train Snake Taxi provides hours of entertainment for players of all ages. Enjoy the colorful graphics and dynamic levels, all while experiencing the joy of collecting and strategizing. games.instructions: Enjoy With This Game

games.name: Jetman Joyride

Embark on an exhilarating adventure with Jetman Joyride, a captivating freestyle journey through the unyielding cosmos. games.name: Stickman Tennis 3D
games.description:
Step into the dynamic world of Stickman Tennis 3D, where you take command of your stickman athlete and engage in a series of thrilling tennis competitions. Experience the excitement as you navigate a variety of challenging courts, each designed to test your skills and strategies. games.instructions: Controls Arrow keys to move C to volley X to slice Z to lob

games.name: Color Jump
games.description:
Color Jump is an exhilarating reflex-based game that challenges your quick thinking and color recognition skills. In this fast-paced adventure, players must tap the screen to rotate a polygon and align it with an incoming colored ball. The objective is simple: match the color of the polygon's section with that of the ball before they collide. If you fail to make the match in time, it s GAME OVER, so stay alert and act swiftly!

The gameplay may seem straightforward, yet it tests your concentration and reaction speed. As you progress, the game accelerates, increasing the difficulty and keeping you on your toes. Every second counts as the anticipation builds for the next color to appear. With each successful match, players can revel in a sense of accomplishment, pushing their limits and striving for a higher score. How long can you endure in this colorful frenzy? Challenge your friends to see who can achieve the longest streak and become the ultimate Color Jump master.

How to play free Color Jump game online

To play Color Jump, simply tap the screen to rotate the polygon and match its color with the approaching ball. Ensure you complete the match before the ball makes contact with the polygon. The game tests your reflexes and color matching skills, so be ready for rapid changes and keep your focus sharp!
games.instructions: Use mouse or arrow keys to play the game

games.name: Magnet 3D Picker Race
games.description:
Welcome to the captivating world of Magnet 3D Picker Race, an exhilarating racing adventure that combines swift vehicle maneuvering with strategic sphere collection. In this thrilling 3D environment, you control a uniquely designed U-shaped Picker vehicle, specifically engineered to gather colorful spheres while weaving through a dynamic racecourse. games.name: 7x7 Ultimate
games.description:
Welcome to 7x7 Ultimate, where colorful tiles are vying for your attention on a vibrant board! In this captivating puzzle game, your goal is to strategize and maneuver the tiles to create consecutive lines, causing them to disappear and clearing the board to score points. Each move counts, so think carefully before sliding those tiles around; careful positioning is crucial to success!

But it s not just about making any moves; the right combinations can lead to explosive combos that will amplify your score! Still, be cautious: overflowing the board and failing to plan your moves can quickly lead to a game over. Manage your resources wisely, especially your boosters like "undo" and "move anywhere," as you don t want to waste them on hasty decisions.

As you delve deeper into the game, the challenge becomes increasingly engaging. The larger 7x7 grid presents a thrilling puzzle with endless possibilities for tile arrangements. Your strategic thinking and planning will be put to the test as you learn how to manipulate the board and maximize your score. Can you master the intricate dynamics of the 7x7 board and rise to the top of the leaderboard?

How to play free 7x7 Ultimate game online

To play 7x7 Ultimate, simply drag tiles to position them into lines of three or more of the same color to clear them from the board. Utilize the boosters wisely and aim to create combos for higher scores. Keep an eye on the board to avoid overfilling!
